name: Release
description: Run a semver release flow with version bump, changelog generation, tagging, and publish orchestration. Best for maintainers on a clean git tree with Python 3, git, and release credentials ready.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Release
pt-BR.description: Executa o fluxo de release semver com bump de versão, changelog, tags e publicação. Ideal para mantenedores em árvore git limpa com Python 3, git e credenciais de release prontas.
